issues.description: Condition missing: '[On Play] If there is a Character with a cost of 0 or with a cost of 8 or more' requires HasCardOnBoard condition with cost filter, not Always
Action type incorrect: '[On K.O.] Trash 2 cards from the top of your deck' should use ForceDiscard (trash from deck), not TrashFromHand (trash from hand)

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[On Play] If there is a Character with a cost of 0 or with a cost of 8 or more, draw 1 card.
[On K.O.] Trash 2 cards from the top of your deck.
